title: What is SIP Pause
answer: SIP Pause allows you to temporarily stop your SIP installments for a limited period without cancelling the SIP completely.

title: What is SIP Cancel
examples: sip cancel karne ka tarika batao
answer: SIP Cancel permanently stops your SIP. Once cancelled, the same SIP cannot be restarted and a new SIP has to be registered.

title: SIP pause eligibility
examples: sip pause allowed for which frequency
pause karne ke liye kaunsa sip chahiye
answer: SIP Pause c is allowed only for Monthly, Quarterly and Annual SIPs registered via Online and Offline modes. Weekly and Daily SIPs cannot be paused. SIPs via Exchange or channel partner mode are also not eligible.

title: SIP cancel eligibility
examples: cancel karne ke liye kaunsa sip
sip cancel ke liye kaunsa sip chahiye
kaunsa sip cancel ho sakta hai
har sip cancel ho sakta hai
daily sip cancel kar sakte hain
answer: SIP Cancel is allowed for all SIPs regardless of frequency, including Daily and Weekly SIPs, and all registration modes including Online, Offline, Exchange and channel partner.

title: How many installments can be paused
examples: how many installments can be paused
how long can i pause sip
kitni baar pause kar sakte hain
answer: SIP can be paused for up to 3 installments.

title: How client approves SIP pause or cancel
examples: sip cancel ke baad kya hoga
approval link kitne din valid hai
answer: The client receives an approval link via email or SMS and must verify using OTP. The approval link is valid for 24 hours. Any installments scheduled before the effective date will still be processed.

title: Folio types supported for SIP pause and cancel
answer: SIP Pause and Cancel support Single holder, Any One or Survivor, and Minor folios. Joint holder folios are not supported.

title: Where to initiate SIP pause or cancel
answer: Distributors can initiate SIP Pause or Cancel requests from the Systematic Plans section inside MF Reports or CRM.

title: What is Download Centre
answer: The Download Centre is a section in the CE app where all requested reports are generated and stored for download. Reports are queued and ready for download instead of making you wait on the page.

title: Where to find Download Centre
answer: On Web: Left menu then Download Centre. On Mobile: Bottom menu, then More, then Download Centre.

title: Download link validity
examples: kitne din valid rahega download link
answer: Download links remain valid for 7 days. After that they expire and the report must be requested again.

title: Report download format
answer: Most reports are downloaded in Excel (.xlsx) format. Some reports like Client 360 are available in PDF format.

title: Share report on WhatsApp
answer: Yes, completed reports include a WhatsApp share button to share the download link directly.

title: How to raise a service request
answer: Click Add Service Request on the Service Request landing page, select the client, choose the request type, provide the required details, and send it to the investor for approval.

title: Where to find Service Request
answer: Navigate to Left Menu, then Mutual Funds, then Service Request.

title: Service request processing time
answer: Processing can take up to 3 business days.

title: Track service request status
answer: From the Service Request landing page, open Recent Service Requests, select View Details under Actions, and check the Updates section. History is available for the last 3 months.

title: Investor authorization for service request
answer: The investor receives a review link via email or SMS, reviews the request, approves or rejects it, and completes OTP verification if required.
